subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: This world is a world of darkness, affliction, and work. It is like the womb; one must bear in patience its troubles and its pains.
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @soul; spirit after death, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @material and spiritual existence; two books
